title: [NEW] Instagram Integration

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m excited to share that you can now import metrics for your Instagram posts into your monday boards using the Data Importer app.

I’ve made a specific tutorial for importing Instagram too. You can either import into a new board/group or into an existing board/group using the post url

image2466×1234 193 KB

posts.author: NicoleB1121 (Nicole Blonder)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m really excited to use this on a new board I’m building, it will save the team so much time! On the other end of things, would you know about a way to export post data from Monday.com to Instagram for posting?

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s great @NicoleB1121 glad to hear it!

monday to Instagram posting isn’t something you can do in Data Importer, but I’d say your best bet would be to try and set-up a workflow in a tool like Zapier or Make.

Feel free to reach out if you have any further questions on this: james@dataimporter.co

posts.author: DanLeo (Dan Leo)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m excited to use this on a new board I’m building—it’ll save the team a lot of time! On a related note, do you know a way to export post data from Monday.com to Instagram for posting?

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @DanLeo glad to hear it! Currently posting to Instagram via monday.com isn’t something you can do via monday. For this you may want to try a solution like Zapier.

posts.author: LeanneM (Leanne McConnachie)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a similar option for LinkedIn?

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
@LeanneM yes! You can import LinkedIn ads data:

LinkedIn Ads Tutorial

posts.author: Artcreez (Artcreez)
posts.cookedHtml: I had the same issue with not catching story replies. Ended up using a workaround by manually marking them in a separate column to keep track. Definitely not ideal but works for now.

posts.author: Artcreez (Artcreez)
posts.cookedHtml: I tested it out with a few personal accounts, and while the integration picks up post data pretty well, it still misses some details like impressions and profile visits. I’ve been using it mainly to track what happens after I buy instagram likes to see if there’s any real engagement beyond the numbers. So far, it’s helpful but could use more metrics to give the full picture.
